# Machine Learning & AI Projects

## Overview

My ML/AI work focuses on generative models, deep learning, and practical applications.

## Featured Projects

### 🤖 Variational Autoencoders (VAE)

**Repository**: [genericVAE](https://github.com/Utzi1/genericVAE)

A flexible framework for implementing and experimenting with Variational Autoencoders.

**Features**:
- Generic VAE architecture
- Multiple dataset support
- Flexible loss functions
- Easy to extend and customize

### 🔄 Collaborative ML Project

**Repository**: [SurgeAHEAD](https://github.com/PegahGolchian/SurgeAHEAD)

A collaborative project combining machine learning with domain-specific applications.

## Technical Stack

### Deep Learning Frameworks
- **PyTorch** — Primary framework for research
- **TensorFlow/Keras** — Prototyping and deployment
- **Scikit-learn** — Traditional ML algorithms

### Tools & Libraries
- **NumPy** — Numerical computing
- **Pandas** — Data handling
- **Matplotlib/Seaborn** — Visualization
- **Jupyter** — Interactive development

## Research Interests

- [ ] Generative modeling
- [ ] Transfer learning
- [ ] Uncertainty quantification
- [ ] Model interpretability
- [ ] Efficient ML architectures

## Key Concepts

### Generative Models
- Variational Autoencoders
- Generative Adversarial Networks
- Diffusion Models

### Deep Learning
- Convolutional Neural Networks
- Recurrent Neural Networks
- Transformers

### Optimization
- Hyperparameter tuning
- Model compression
- Inference optimization

## Best Practices

✅ **What I Follow**:
- Reproducible experiments with seeds
- Detailed hyperparameter logging
- Model evaluation on test sets
- Clear documentation
- Version control for code & data

## Learning Resources

- [Deep Learning Specialization](https://www.deeplearning.ai/)
- [Fast.ai](https://www.fast.ai/) — Practical deep learning
- [Papers with Code](https://paperswithcode.com/) — Latest research
- [Distill.pub](https://distill.pub/) — Clear explanations
